title: DracFun
description: One of the most famous Draconic Evolution mod ported to a Slimefun Addon.
body:
# What is DracFun?
DracFun is plugin that ports the mod [Draconic Evolution](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/draconic-evolution) to a Paper based server. It adds new powerful tools, machines, and items which are based upon the plugin's main resource - Draconium.

# Installation Requirements
- 1.20.1 Paper or Forks
- Slimefun Build RC-37 or later

# Configuration
Use DracFun's in-built config.yml or Slimefun items.yml for configuration.
```
options:
  # Enables hard-mode, recommended for servers using Infinity, Supreme or SlimeFrame for balancing reasons.
  # true -> enabled, false -> disabled
  hard-mode: true
  # Enables the use of vanilla dragon egg item. If disabled then uses the plugin's in built dragon egg item.
  # true -> enabled, false -> disabled
  use-dragon-egg: true
```

# Note
- I will not backport the plugin to older versions, it is just a lot of hassle to keep compatibility with older versions. Also the fact that I would like to utilize newer optimized methods rather than older buggy and laggy methods.
- The plugin is **NOT** feature complete yet. There is a lot of stuff to be reworked.
- Report all issues on [GitHub](https://github.com/PhoenixCodingStuff/Bug-Reports) only!
- Feel free to use [GitHub](https://github.com/PhoenixCodingStuff/Bug-Reports) for config / other suggestions.
